case_title: HUANG, GUO KANG VS MYEK, ROBERT MATTHEN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MYEK, ROBERT MATTHEN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUANG, GUO KANG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MYEK, ROBERT MATTHEN THERE IS NO EVIDENCE SUBMITTED TO THE COURT THAT THE PLAINTIFF IS THE REGISTERED OWNER OF THE SUBJECT VEHICLE. PLAINTIFF IS PRECLUDED FROM RECOVERING FOR ITS PROPERTY DAMAGE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,387.39 FILED BY HUANG, GUO KANG AS TO DEFENDANT MYEK, ROBERT MATTHEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-04-2005 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MYEK, ROBERT MATTHEN
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLTF. $15.40 FEE PAID. SUBMITTED TO COMM FOR ORDER.
PER COMM, MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION IS GRANTED. AMENDED JUDGMENT TO BE ENTERED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUANG, GUO KANG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MYEK, ROBERT MATTHEN $1,425.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,447.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
